[CONFIG:"/TEMP_DIR/lakehouse_analytics/governance/roles.yaml"] AWSGlueConsoleFullAccess grants the data-admin persona the broad Glue/S3/CloudWatch/CloudWatch Logs access needed to administer Glue databases, tables, crawlers, and jobs from the console in this reference kit.
